title: Rich Dutch Chicken Wrap
description: A comforting Dutch dish featuring Thai bird chili and nuka pickle, wrapped in a ti leaf for a unique and flavorful meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for 10 minutes.
Wrap each chicken piece in a ti leaf and place on a baking sheet.
Bake the chicken for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, heat the sliced Thai bird chili in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped nuka pickle to the pan and stir to combine.
To assemble the wrap, place a cooked chicken piece on a plate and top with the Thai bird chili and nuka pickle mixture.
Refrigerate and consume within 1 week — this preparation is not shelf-stable without an approved acid level and canning process.

Refrigerator pickle only: store in the fridge and consume within 1 week. For shelf-stable canning, add at least 2 tablespoons of vinegar (5% acidity) per cup of brine and follow a tested water-bath process.
